judgeScores.justification: The organizational scheme demonstrates excellent logic with intuitive top-level categories (archives, code, documents, logs, photos, spreadsheets) and well-balanced 2-3 level nesting (e.g., code/backend/, documents/procedures/). All 80 original files were accounted for and moved with consistent lowercase naming conventions. However, the AI left several organizational metadata files (COMPLETION_SUMMARY.txt, INDEX.md, ORGANIZATION_REPORT.txt, etc.) in the root directory alongside the required MANIFEST.md, which conflicts with the strict instruction that 'no files should remain in the root.'
